title: What if 3 I was stopped
wikitext:
[]: What if 3-I was stopped...             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Sep 27, 2006 2:21 am After seeing this rather unsettling imageâ€¦ http://img142.imageshack.us/img142/6594/1158718440438lz8.jpg I began to wonderâ€¦What exactly wouldâ€™ve happened to the pilots and everyone had 3-I been prevented? Somehow I think Keele would be rather pissed offâ€¦ This visual may be a good example of what kind of things would happen to themâ€¦captured, humilliated, stripped of any privacy or dignity, interrogated, possibly torturedâ€¦chances are their lives would become ones of complete isolation and surveillance from there onâ€¦like in this imageâ€¦this is the lowest levelâ€¦the most complete shredding of personal dignity one can haveâ€¦very disturbingâ€¦ Perhaps they might have been simply killedâ€¦ Gendo may kill Shinji for destroying his opportunity to see Yuiâ€¦or Shinji may go back to normal assuming he learned the whole â€œMy life is worth living thingâ€ Rei mightâ€™ve been killed to eliminate all the evidence of cloning and crapâ€¦ Plus she herself may prefer thatâ€¦ Since the only thing in her life she seemed to treasure up until that point was the feeling of being essentialâ€¦ Now there may be no clones of her to replace herâ€¦ But she no longer has her pourposeâ€¦ Im not sure about Asukaâ€¦she may be able to go back to normalâ€¦ Toji doesnâ€™t seem to have any of that â€œdelve into the mind, crap on himâ€â€¦hes the most stableâ€¦perhaps he may become hard and sternâ€¦or with Hikari and Kensuke at his side, he may be just fineâ€¦ Of course this all assumes they each arenâ€™t immedietly and forever captive of Seele like I suggested beforeâ€¦

[]:             Quote Post by PilotIkari » Wed Sep 27, 2006 3:14 am Well, I believe that the Episode 26 ending does represent Shinji stopping/rejecting Instrumentality. Shinji - Well, he'd still need a lot of therapy, but I think he's generally learnt his lesson about loving himself. Asuka - She's certainly come down off her high horse now. It could be argued that her greatest 'sin' is pride - the same sin the fallen angels were punished for in the Bible. Rei - She is no longer subservient to Gendo, her giving Shinji the reins to Instrumentality reflect this, so who knows? she may have been able to live a life of her own afterwards or found a new purpose (A Post Ep-26 fanfic I read had Shinji save Rei after he goes to her apartment and found she has slit her wrists :? needless to say she lives and it becomes a glorious Rei/Shinji fic :) ) Gendo - Probably disappeared/Killed himself after not reuniting with Yui. Misato - Not Sure, Most likely repaired her relationship with Shinji and overcame her grief she felt at Kaji's death. May also have given up the drinking as being tired of 'hiding' behind it. PenPen - Probably had a beer, ate some fish and then fell asleep. EDIT: That Picture is highly upsetting. Touji especially with his wounds. Also, it reminds me of the 'prisoner' pictures AlQaeda and the like have released.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Sep 27, 2006 12:46 pm The JSSDF were sent in with orders to shoot on sight - there would not have been any survivors.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Sep 27, 2006 1:00 pm @Mr. Tines But if 3I would be prevented, then Rei wouldn't merge with Lilith, ergo she could kick the filthy arse of the JSSDF. :twisted: Not to mention the EVAs. But the question is: when sh/would 3I be interrupted? That sets a lot of things.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Wed Sep 27, 2006 2:16 pm Source and context of picture plz.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 27, 2006 5:50 pm Source is THAT BOARD. Everyday is repost day.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Sep 27, 2006 6:09 pm wish i knew...found it on THAT Board...but yeah i wanna know what Seele would do...Nerv would obviously be disbanded...and what would they do with the Eva?...the only way i can imagine 3-I being prevented would be perhaps if Lilith were killed (obviously by Shinji and/or Asuka in an Eva) before merging with Rei...certainly if that was the case...Shinji and/or Asuka would come and save the important Nerv staff (Maya, Hyuga, and the one with the glasses...[i dont care what the names are...] maybe have one of em die...not Maya though) ...this assuming Shinji was ready to roll and didnt hold Misato back (getting her killed)...and help Asuka kill teh Harpies... Fuyutski would probably keep Gendo from commiting suicide or killing Shinji...he seems to be a very stable and cool individual who would have understanding for the point of veiw of those who would wish for 3-I to not happen...Keele on the other hand...i cannot see such understanding from him...hed probly try to do what i said before to the kids...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 27, 2006 6:18 pm master0rolando wrote: the only way i can imagine 3-I being prevented would be perhaps if Lilith were killed

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Sep 28, 2006 5:13 am but Unit 01 was used to make the Tree of Life...so wouldnt they need Lilith cuz 01 is already used...i suppose Adam is there but Lilith is the only other angel left to merge with him...

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Sep 28, 2006 5:28 am innerestin

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Sep 28, 2006 9:13 am Reichu wrote: master0rolando wrote: the only way i can imagine 3-I being prevented would be perhaps if Lilith were killed

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Sep 28, 2006 9:44 am master0rolando wrote: but Unit 01 was used to make the Tree of Life...so wouldnt they need Lilith cuz 01 is already used...i suppose Adam is there but Lilith is the only other angel left to merge with him...

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Sep 28, 2006 4:59 pm i thought the pourpose of the lance was obvious...to create the tree of life...

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Sep 29, 2006 12:31 am master0rolando wrote: i thought the pourpose of the lance was obvious...to create the tree of life...

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Sep 29, 2006 7:40 am ToL=? :? I've met with YnL and LoL, but not with this one.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Sep 29, 2006 8:36 am FauÃŸtin wrote: ToL=? :? I've met with YnL and LoL, but not with this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Sep 29, 2006 8:38 am the_seventh_child wrote: FauÃŸtin wrote: ToL=? :? I've met with YnL and LoL, but not with this one.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Sep 29, 2006 2:51 pm I think that ultimately, unless all angel and eva materials were obliterated, 3I can not be prevented. Even if the plans of Seele were stopped, at some point in the future some fanatics are going to start everything back up again.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Sep 29, 2006 4:01 pm I don't know about the others, but I imagine Shinji, as the individual that actually went right ahead and pushed the button, all for personal reasons, would suffer a rather ugly fate.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Sat Sep 30, 2006 8:20 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I don't know about the others, but I imagine Shinji, as the individual that actually went right ahead and pushed the button, all for personal reasons, would suffer a rather ugly fate.

Article: What if 3 I was stopped
27, 2006 3:14 am Well, I believe that the Episode 26 ending does represent Shinji stopping/rejecting Instrumentality. Shinji - Well, he'd still need a lot of therapy, but I think he's generally learnt his lesson about loving himself. Asuka - She's certainly come down off her high horse now. It could be argued that her greatest 'sin' is pride - the same sin the fallen angels were punished for in the Bible. Rei - She is no longer subservient to Gendo, her giving Shinji the reins to Instrumentality reflect this, so who knows? she may have been able to live a life of her own afterwards or found a new purpose (A Post Ep-26 fanfic I read had Shinji save Rei after he goes to her apartment and found she has slit her wrists :? needless to say she lives and it becomes a glorious Rei/Shinji fic :) ) Gendo - Probably disappeared/Killed himself after not reuniting with Yui. Misato - Not Sure, Most likely repaired her relationship with Shinji and overcame her grief she felt at Kaji's death. May also have given up the drinking as being tired of 'hiding' behind it. PenPen - Probably had a beer, ate some fish and then fell asleep. EDIT: That Picture is highly upsetting. Touji especially with his wounds. Also, it reminds me of the 'prisoner' pictures AlQaeda and the like have released.

But the question is: when sh/would 3I be interrupted? That sets a lot of things.

Fuyutski would probably keep Gendo from commiting suicide or killing Shinji...he seems to be a very stable and cool individual who would have understanding for the point of veiw of those who would wish for 3-I to not happen...Keele on the other hand...i cannot see such understanding from him...hed probly try to do what i said before to the kids...
